title: The Post Office Act, 2023
full_text: The Post Office Act, 2023 डाकघर अधिनियम, 2023 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 2023-43 Act Number: 43 Enactment Date: 2023-12-24 Act Year: 2023 Short Title: The Post Office Act, 2023 Hindi Title: डाकघर अधिनियम, 2023 Long Title: An Act to consolidate and amend the law relating to Post Office in India and to provide for matters connected therewith or incidental thereto. Ministry: Ministry of Communications Department: Department of Posts Enforcement Date: 18-06-2024 TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Post Office Act, 2023 Show all section Section 1. Short title and commencement. Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. Services to be provided by Post Office. Section 4. Exclusive privilege in respect of postage stamps. Section 5. Addresses and postcodes. Section 6. Power to give effect to arrangements with other countries. Section 7. Recovery of sums due in respect of services provided by Post Office. Section 8. Official mark to be evidence of certain facts denoted. Section 9. Power to intercept, open or detain any item or deliver item to customs authority. Section 10. Exemption from liability. Section 11. Delegation of power, other than rulemaking powers to Director General. Section 12. Power to make rules. Section 13. Power to make regulations. Section 14. Laying of rules and regulations in Parliament. Section 15. Power to remove difficulties. Section 16. Repeal and savings.
